chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO.S- 81 OF 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- D/O MATTER FOR HEARING OF CMA NO.6190/2025 10.11.2025 Petitioners are present in person Ms. Amna Ansari, Addl.P.G. Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG alongwith DSP Legal-II and P.I. Farooq SDI Korangi and M. Tariq PS KIA Karachi ------------------------- Pursuant to the order dated 17.03.2025 SSP District Korangi was directed to provide list of cases which were pending against the petitioners, such list has been provided today with copy to the petitioners. Petitioners filed listed CMA for initiation of contempt proceedings. Since the police was only directed to provide list of cases which has been accordingly provided so also list of FIRs submitted by the SHO Police Station KIA alongwith copies of about 14 FIRs registered against the petitioners since 2014 by individual for the different allegations and only FIR No.1449/2021 was recorded by the police. It appears that the petitioners intend to pressurize the police from pursuing mandate of law and by filing of frivolous applications the petitioners also wasted precious time. Accordingly, listed application is dismissed with a note of caution that if the petitioners file such type contempt application, heave cost shall be imposed upon him. JUDGE MUSHARRAF ALI
